pages.title: Food Tower Defense
pages.description:
Build and manage multiple food-themed towers to stop waves of quirky snack enemies in this tower defense game. Utilize strategic placement of sweet and savory-themed defenses to protect your base from escalating hordes. Each level introduces new enemy types and tower upgrades, challenging players to adapt their tactics and secure victory through careful resource management and timing.

Key Features

• Food-inspired tower varieties  
• Strategic defense placement controls  
• Progressive enemy difficulty waves  
• Upgrade-based tower enhancement  
• Casual-friendly snack-themed visuals

pages.title: Geometry Tower Defense
pages.description:
Deploy geometric shapes strategically to block waves of enemies advancing through intricate paths in this tower defense challenge. Players position and upgrade varied defense units with distinct firing patterns to prevent breaches. Mission difficulty ramps up with faster and more numerous attackers, testing your placement and resource management skills level by level.

Key Features

• Shape-based tower deployment  
• Tactical upgrade system  
• Progressive enemy waves  
• Multiple defensive tower types  
• Minimalist geometric visual style

pages.title: Terrifying Zombies: Tower Defense II
